description: Bird occurrence data for Washtenaw County in southeastern Michigan, including the cities of Ann Arbor and Ypsilanti.

American White Pelican.reason: Rare vagrant; spiky data caused by multi-day stays attracting many observers. More data will smooth this out.

Green-winged Teal.reason: Genuine two-passage migrant; small but consistent winter presence is not large enough to suppress summer valley detection correctly.

display_settings.about_text: BirdFinder helps you discover which birds are present in Washtenaw County throughout the year, based on eBird observation data.
